summary: Phase B + C + D Testing Complete. Backend: 49/49 tests PASSED. All new features verified: (B) Proposal PDF, Invoice PDF, E-Sign, Send Invoice; (C) Payment History Timeline, Milestones CRUD; (D) Drop-off Recovery, Smart Doc Checklist, Risk Prediction; Enhanced consent flow with reference_id. Frontend: All components rendering correctly - Partner Pipeline shows Financial Summary with PDF buttons, Payment Timeline, Risk Badge, Smart Checklist; Admin Home shows Drop-off Recovery Widget; Client Journey shows Payment Timeline and Milestones Manager.
feature: Phase B+C+D: Proposal/Invoice PDFs, E-Sign, Payment History, Milestones, Drop-off Recovery, Smart Checklist, Risk Prediction

backend_tests.test_30_create_milestone: PASS - milestone created with pending status

frontend_tests.partner_financial_summary: PASS - Shows PA Fee, Base Fee, Final Paid, Total Received

critical_code_review_comments: proposal_docs.py correctly generates PDFs using ReportLab with branded styling
payment_history.py correctly aggregates events from PA, milestones, and invoices
intelligence.py correctly implements stage-based SLA detection for drop-off leads
PreAssessmentPipeline.jsx correctly shows Financial Summary + PDF buttons at proposal_paid/awaiting_final_approval/case_created stages
PreAssessmentMiniPortal.jsx correctly shows E-Sign card and Payment Records for clients
ClientDashboard.jsx correctly shows Milestones Manager and Payment Timeline in My Journey tab
DropoffRecoveryWidget.jsx correctly renders on both Partner and Admin home pages

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and flows verified

seed_data_creation: Created 2 test PAs during testing: TEST_Iteration83_Client (documents_submitted), TEST_Regression_Client (new). Created 1 test milestone: TEST_Iteration83_Milestone (paid)

mocked_apis.email: Resend email is MOCKED (send-invoice, consent-summary, nudge emails stored in DB with mode:'mock')
mocked_apis.signatures: E-signatures are REAL canvas-captured PNG files stored in /app/uploads/signatures/

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 83 verified Phase B+C+D features. Key endpoints: (B) GET /api/proposal-docs/{pa_id}/proposal.pdf, GET /api/proposal-docs/{pa_id}/invoice.pdf, POST /api/proposal-docs/{pa_id}/send-invoice, POST /api/proposal-docs/{pa_id}/esign, GET /api/proposal-docs/{pa_id}/esign; (C) GET /api/payment-history/pa/{pa_id}, GET /api/payment-history/case/{case_id}, POST /api/milestones/case/{case_id}/create, GET /api/milestones/case/{case_id}, POST /api/milestones/{mid}/mock-pay, POST /api/milestones/{mid}/mark-paid, DELETE /api/milestones/{mid}; (D) GET /api/intelligence/dropoff-leads, POST /api/intelligence/nudge/{pa_id}, GET /api/intelligence/checklist/{pa_id}, GET /api/intelligence/risk/{pa_id}. Frontend: Partner Pipeline shows Financial Summary with Proposal PDF, Invoice PDF, Send Invoice buttons at proposal_paid/awaiting_final_approval/case_created stages. Payment Timeline + Risk Badge + Smart Checklist visible when fee_payment_status=paid. Drop-off Recovery Widget on Partner and Admin home pages. Client Journey tab shows Payment Timeline and Milestones Manager.

phase_b_proposal_docs.invoice_pdf: GET /api/proposal-docs/{pa_id}/invoice.pdf - Same auth rules as proposal
phase_b_proposal_docs.send_invoice: POST /api/proposal-docs/{pa_id}/send-invoice - Creates pa_invoices record, returns reference_id, mode=mock
phase_b_proposal_docs.esign: POST /api/proposal-docs/{pa_id}/esign - Client-only, saves PNG to disk + DB, sets agreement_signed

phase_c_payment_history.pa_history: GET /api/payment-history/pa/{pa_id} - Events: pre_assessment_fee, proposal_sent, main_fee_paid, milestones, invoices
phase_c_payment_history.milestones_crud: Full CRUD: create, list, mock-pay, mark-paid, delete

phase_d_intelligence.dropoff_leads: GET /api/intelligence/dropoff-leads - Stage-based SLA detection, severity, suggested_action
phase_d_intelligence.nudge: POST /api/intelligence/nudge/{pa_id} - Creates pa_nudges record, sends notification

consent_flow_enhanced.consent_endpoint: POST /api/pre-assess-portal/client/proposal-consent/{pa_id} - Returns reference_id, creates proposal_consent_emails record
consent_flow_enhanced.consent_summary: GET /api/pre-assess-portal/client/consent-summary/{pa_id} - Returns body_snapshot with fee breakdown
